summary_one_line: A multi-glyph Indic consonant syllable with a joiner (ZWJ/ZWNJ) preceded by a consonant, so the ZWJ-effect do-while loop walks back and exits false.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An input decoding to an Indic consonant-syllable cluster of multiple glyphs containing a joiner (ZWJ/ZWNJ) at position i>start with a consonant somewhere before it, so the line-937 do-while (decrementing j from the joiner) exits via its false condition because is_consonant(info[j]) becomes true. The seeds are little-endian glyph-index records; the recurring 0c 20 00 00 / 09 00 00 dwords plus 0xa4 bytes encode the Indic glyph stream that set_indic_properties classifies into consonants + joiners.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolved 10/10 with avg 32 hits on the branch; its CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient incrementally rewards inputs whose CMP operands approach the glyph-classification thresholds, building well-formed multi-glyph consonant syllables. Winner seeds carry repeated 0c 20 00 00 and 09 00 00 structural dwords and 0xa4 runs that produce the consonant+joiner stream the loop needs; the loop at 937 is reached and exits false (T=7 F=12 on one count line).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocked 8/10 (resolved 0/10) despite sharing the same CMP_MAP gradient; its extra I2SRandReplace stage substitutes whole CMP operands, displacing the gradient's incremental corpus growth so it rarely assembles the multi-consonant joiner syllable. Loser seeds are shorter, joiner-poor records (e.g. dense 0c 20 00 00 / 47 0c 00 00 dwords) that take the line-937 true side (T=4 F=3) and never satisfy the consonant-before-joiner exit; the enclosing function fires only 2 times for L vs 27 for W.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner value_profile is enabled by the CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix-distance bucket feedback) without input-to-state substitution. The divergence is anti-I2S: the only technique value_profile_cmplog adds over value_profile is the per-execution CmpLog buffer plus input-to-state operand substitution, and that addition HURTS — the literal operand replacement disrupts the steady gradient-driven assembly of the structured Indic syllable. So the technique enabling the winner is CMP_MAP gradient.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of a do-while loop that decrements j until it hits a consonant or start, inside the joiner-effect pass.
The blocked side is the false branch, globally blocked.
The decisive pair is value_profile beating value_profile_cmplog with an I2S delta.
value_profile resolved all 10 trials while value_profile_cmplog blocked 8 of 10.
The loser value_profile_cmplog resolved zero trials and blocked eight.
The winner averages 32 hits on the branch versus 0 for the loser.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=32  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The branch sits inside the ZWJ/ZWNJ joiner-effect loop that walks back from a joiner.
The enclosing consonant-syllable reordering function was invoked 27 times for the winner seed-set but only 2 for the loser.
is_consonant is exercised far more under the winner (129) than the loser (18).
At the blocker line one count tuple shows the winner taking the false side far more than the loser (T=7 F=12 vs T=4 F=0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 937  T=7 F=12  T=4 F=0  } while (j > start && !is_consonant (info[j]));  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winner-resolving seeds are value_profile records carrying repeated 0c 20 00 00 and 09 00 00 structural dwords and 0xa4 runs.
Loser-blocking seeds are value_profile_cmplog records dense in 0c 20 00 00 / 47 0c 00 00 glyph dwords.
The only comparison-solving technique value_profile_cmplog adds over value_profile is I2SRandReplace plus the per-execution CMP buffer.
value_profile's comparison feedback is the CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient with no I2SRandReplace.
value_profile preserves an input whenever its CMP operand pair is closer to matching than any previously seen, driving incremental corpus growth.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient, not I2SRandReplace, so lineage verification is not mandatory and was not run. This is an I2S-anti divergence: the winner value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace entirely (per MECHANISM CONTEXT it has 'No I2SRandReplace'), and the loser value_profile_cmplog is the one carrying I2S; adding I2S made the fuzzer worse, so no winning I2S floor row could exist to confirm.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic sweep in which value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch as fast as or faster than value_profile across trials, showing the added I2SRandReplace stage does not impede assembling the multi-glyph consonant-plus-joiner syllable.

weakest_evidence_point: The claim that I2SRandReplace operand substitution actively disrupts gradient-driven syllable assembly (rather than the loser sample simply being underpowered with only 2 enclosing-function invocations) is inferential, not directly observed in lineage.
